title: fix(quest-gate): allow org members + don't close on label-by-non-maintainer
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Smoother Quest Labeling
gist.blurb: Fixed a bug where maintainers were getting locked out of their own quests. The hive's bouncer is now a little smarter about who gets the VIP label.
gist.summary: Updated the issue quest gatekeeper workflow to properly recognize organization members as maintainers and handle invalid label applications more gracefully.
gist.impact: Maintainers can now properly apply the POLLEN-QUEST label without issues, and non-maintainers who accidentally apply it won't have their valid issues automatically closed.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a 'gatekeeper' or 'bouncer' for quests (issues). The bee (Polly) and a robot (Monitor Robot) checking a VIP list or a clipboard at a garden gate.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security badge, holding a clipboard next to a chunky monitor robot at a wooden garden gate. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'VIP LIST'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
